The newspaper said PsiQuantum has raised $230 million (£179m) as it seeks to join Google and IBM in the race to develop a working quantum computer.

occurrence_sentence: PsiQuantum was founded by Bristol professor Jeremy O'Brien.

occurrence_sentence: The company, which is based in the UK and Palo Alto, Calif., is still in stealth but, according to the company's website, it is building general purpose silicon photonic quantum computers based technology developed at the University of Bristol.

occurrence_sentence: Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience. He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.
